## Meeting purpose

[Discuss co-marketing opportunities and partnership integration between fwd.digital and This Participant's Company](https://fathom.video/share/J_Bwsk-YYyAXavDVManrsCTcG1EesD-m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is rebranding and will have a new website/brand soon](https://fathom.video/share/J_Bwsk-YYyAXavDVManrsCTcG1EesD-m?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Opportunity to feature This Participant's Company as a partner on fwd.digital's new website](https://fathom.video/share/J_Bwsk-YYyAXavDVManrsCTcG1EesD-m?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Plan a co-hosted breakfast event in mid-September in SF to promote the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/J_Bwsk-YYyAXavDVManrsCTcG1EesD-m?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Align on training curriculum and integration priorities for fwd.digital's new client Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/J_Bwsk-YYyAXavDVManrsCTcG1EesD-m?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital Rebrand and Website

  - [fwd.digital hired an agency for a rebrand with new logo/visuals](https://fathom.video/share/J_Bwsk-YYyAXavDVManrsCTcG1EesD-m?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [New website will launch soon with a fresh, modern look](https://fathom.video/share/J_Bwsk-YYyAXavDVManrsCTcG1EesD-m?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Opportunity to feature This Participant's Company as a partner on new site](https://fathom.video/share/J_Bwsk-YYyAXavDVManrsCTcG1EesD-m?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

### Co-Marketing Event

  - [Plan a co-hosted breakfast event in mid-September in SF](https://fathom.video/share/J_Bwsk-YYyAXavDVManrsCTcG1EesD-m?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

  - [Opportunity for This Participant's Company to get involved in training/integration](https://fathom.video/share/J_Bwsk-YYyAXavDVManrsCTcG1EesD-m?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

  - [Key integration areas: calls, emails, CRM data](https://fathom.video/share/J_Bwsk-YYyAXavDVManrsCTcG1EesD-m?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
